sentence_reviews.text: A vector field is learned to transport samples from a simple base distribution to data along probability paths.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, abstract and method: learns continuous normalizing flow vector fields over probability paths from simple/noise distributions to data.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition closely matches the cited paper's framing.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Differential equations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Flow matching & transport objectives is modeled as depending on Generative modeling, Differential equations and feeding downstream nodes such as Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
